FunctionClass: elliptic multiple polylogarithms on a single fixed elliptic curve, all L

Records.description: Elliptic ladder family, elliptic-ladder_L2x1_massless-internal-dualconformal. Family 1 of arXiv:2301.07965 (I_{L,R}): the (L+R)-cell ladder chain whose two distinguished massless legs p5, p10 attach to the SAME central rung (L cells left, R right); 4 off-shell corner legs; I_{L,R} = I_{R,L}; total loops L+R; lowest member I_{1,1} = the elliptic double box. Evaluated to elliptic multiple polylogarithms on ONE fixed elliptic curve at all loop orders. The staggered family I_{L,M,R} (legs M rungs apart) is known but not seeded.
